title: Smoky Crispy Croatian Chestnuts Skillet
description: Quick-fix Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring roasted chestnuts, smoky paprika, and crispy prosciutto.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chestnuts and smoked paprika. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Meanwhile, cook the prosciutto slices in a separate pan over medium heat until crispy.
Chop the crispy prosciutto into small pieces and add to the skillet with the chestnuts.
Deglaze the skillet with a small amount of water to release the browned bits from the bottom.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Optional: serve with a squeeze of lemon juice.
